description: Google Knowledge Graph Search API lets developers search Google Knowledge Graph entities such as people, places, and things. It returns read-only JSON-LD entity search results based on query text, IDs, languages, and types.
summary: kgsearch.googleapis.com exposes one REST API surface: the Google Knowledge Graph Search API at `https://kgsearch.googleapis.com/v1`, authenticated with a Google Cloud API key sent as the `key` query parameter.
